spec_match.rationale: Validates the exact WGSL buffer_view alignment and size constraints from the proposal: offset % align === 0 and type size + offset <= buffer length.

interactive.rationale: Real spinbuttons for buffer size, offset, alignment, and type size with a validate button and live status readout.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Promises exact WGSL validation rules; delivers a working validator.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers the happy path and boundary; could demonstrate the failure case more explicitly.

references.rationale: Links to chromestatus.com/feature/5094091886034944 and the gpuweb proposal.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Browser-tested: spinbuttons default to 64/48/16/16, validation shows '48 + 16 = 64 fits'. No console errors.
